message:
feat(robot): add CASS relevance filtering (ntm-mpw1)

Implement FilterResults() with:
- Recency scoring: newer sessions get higher scores (RecencyBonus)
- Same-project preference: 15% bonus for matching workspace (ProjectBonus)
- Min relevance threshold: filter out low-scoring results (MinRelevance)
- Max items limit: cap returned results (MaxItems)
- Session date extraction from file paths
- Score normalization for different CASS output ranges

Types added:
- FilterConfig: filtering configuration
- ScoredHit: hit with computed relevance score
- CASSScoreDetail: breakdown of score components
- FilterResult: filtering results with stats

Unblocks ntm-pd0d (context injection) chain.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
